subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of the Primal Point for him who hath taken God as his Protector, when there shineth upon him the Sun of Sanctification [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نقطه الاولی لمن اتخذ الله لنفسه ولیا و اذا اشرق علیه شمس التقدیس عن
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
